sections.sectionTitle: Levi mi Phazah leh a Nasep uh

verses.text: Hihte pen Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Moses tawh a thugen hun lai-a Aaron leh Moses' huna mite ahi hi
Aaron' tapate' minte in: A ta upa Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, leh Ithamar hi a
sathau a kinilh siampi, siampi za-ah na a sem dingin a kikipsak, Aaron' tapate' minte ahi hi

Ahih hangin Sinai sehnel gam Topa' mai-ah mei siangtholo a zat uh ciangin Topa' mai-ah Nadab leh Abihu si hi. Amaute in ta neilo uh ahih ciangin Eleazar leh Ithamar in a pa uh Aaron' nuntak sungteng bek siampi na a sem uh ahi hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Levi minamte va paipih in la, amaute in siampi Aaron' na a sep theihna dingun a mai-ah va koih in
Amaute in biakbukah a sep uh ciangin amah leh mihonpi-a' dingin kikhopna buk mai-ah na sem ding uh hi
Amaute in kikhopna buk sung nazat khempeuh vaan ding uh a, biakbukah a sep uh ciangin Israel mite-a' dingin na sem ding uh hi
Nangmah in Aaron leh a tapate' tungah Levi mite na pia ding a, amaute pen Israel mite lak panin keima tungah a kipiate hi ding uh hi
Nangmah in Aaron leh a tapate na seh ding a, amaute in a siampi nasep uh don ding uh hi. Ahih hangin midang khatpeuh in siampi nasep a sep leh, tua mi kithat ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“En in, Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh tangdingin Levi mite ka la khin hi. Levi mite pen keima-a' hi ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh tacil khempeuh keima-a' ahi hi. Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in, Israel sungah tacil khempeuh, mihing tacil leh ganhing tacil khempeuh, keima-a' dingin ka ap a, amaute pen keima-a' hi ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Sinai sehnel gam Moses kiangah
“Levi mite, a behbeh, a innkuankuanin, pasal kha khat a pha panin a tungsiah peuhmah na sim ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses thu a kipiak bangin amah in Topa' thupiakna tawh kizui-in amaute a sim hi
Levi' tapate' min in: Gershon, Kohath, leh Merari ahi hi
Gershon' tapate' min in: Libni leh Shimei ahi hi
Kohath' tapate' min in: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, leh Uzziel ahi hi
Merari' tapate' min in: Mahli leh Mushi ahi hi. Hih mite pen Levi mite beh lutangte ahi uh hi
Gershon-te beh pen Libni mite leh Shimei mite hi a, hihte pen Gershon-te beh ahi uh hi
Amaute, kha khat pan a tungsiah a pha pasal peuhmah tul sagih leh za nga ahi hi
Gershon-te beh in nitumna lam biakbuk nungah giahphual sat ding uh a
tua Gershon mite sung pan a beh ukpi pen Lael' tapa Eliasaf hi ding hi
Gershon-te beh in kikhopna buk sungah a et dingte pen a biakbuk, puanbuk a tuamna tawh, kikhopna buk kongkhak puankhai
buktuala puan kikhaite, biakbuk kiima om buktuala kongkhak puankhai leh biakna tau, leh a khaute leh hihte tawh a kizom nasep khempeuh ahi hi
Kohath-te beh pen Amram mite, Izhar mite, Hebron mite, leh Uzziel mite hi a, hihte pen Kohath-te beh ahi hi
Pasal khempeuh kha khat pan a tungsiah, biakbuk nasep a sem peuhmah tul giat leh za guk ahi hi
Kohath-te beh in biakbuk leitaw lampangah giahphual sat ding uh a
Kohath mite sung pan a beh ukpi pen Uzziel' tapa Elizafan hi ding hi
Amau' et dingte pen thuciamna singkuang, a sabuai, a meivakkhuam, a biakna taute, siampite in nasepna-in a zat uh biakbuk nazatte' kidalna puan leh hihte tawh a kizom nasep khempeuh ahi hi
Siampi Aaron' tapa Eleazar pen Levi mi makaite tungah a ukpi hi ding a, biakbuk a en mite' nasepna vil ding hi
Merari-te beh pen Mahli mite leh Mushi mite hi a, hihte pen Merari-te beh ahi hi
Amaute kha khat panin a tungsiah pasal peuhmah tul guk leh za nih ahi hi
Merari-te beh sung pan a beh ukpi pen Abihail' tapa Zuriel hi ding a, amaute pen biakbuk leilu lampangah giahphual a sat dingte ahi uh hi
Merari-te beh' et dinga a kisehte pen biakbuk khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite, khuam bullente, a nengneng teng leh hihte tawh a kizom nasep khempeuh ahi hi
Buktual kimkot-a khuampite leh a bullente tawh, khetphimte leh a khaute zong ahi hi

Nisuahna lampang biakbuk mai, kikhopna buk mai-ah giahphual a sat ding mite pen Israel mite-a' dingin bang khat peuhpeuh sepna dingin biakbuk sungah thu a nei Moses leh Aaron leh a tapate hi a, midang khatpeuh in biakbuk sungah na a sep leh kithat ding hi
Moses leh Aaron in Topa' thupiakna tawh a innkuankuanun a sim Levi mi pasal kha khat panin a tungsiah peuhmah tul sawmnih leh tul nih a pha hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Israel mite sung pan pasal tacil khempeuh sim in la, kha khat panin a tungsiah peuhmah a min la in
Israel mite lak panin tacil khempeuh tangdingin Levi mite nong laksak ding a, Israel mite' ganhing tacil khempeuh tangdingin Levi mite' ganhing nong laksak ding hi — kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topa' thupiak bangin Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh a sim hi
Kha khat panin a tungsiah tacil pasal a kisim peuhmah tul sawmnih leh tul nih leh za nih leh sawmsagih leh thum ahi hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh leh a ganhingte uh tangdingin Levi mite leh a ganhingte uh la in. Levi mite keima-a' hi ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Levi mi pasal khempeuh sangin Israel mi tacil khempeuh za nih leh sawmsagih leh thumin tamzaw ahih manin
tuate tatna dingin shekel khatah gerah sawmnih a pha, biakinn shekel zangin mi khat ciangin shekel nga pai la in la
tua a tamzaw teng a kitatna uh sumte Aaron leh a tapate tungah pia in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Levi mite banah a vallai mite tung panin kitatkhiatna sum la a
biakinn shekel zangin Israel mi tacilte tung panin sum shekel tul khat leh za thum leh sawmguk leh nga a la hi
Tua ciangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak mah bangin Topa' thu tawh kizui-in kitatkhiatna sumte Aaron leh a tapate tungah Moses in a pia hi.
